judge.opinion: The market just bled out to $65.6K and everyone's still flinching — Fear & Greed at 33 is the sound of a room full of people who got hit and don't want to get hit again. But the chart is whispering August 2024: same chop, same fear, same setup where the patient money accumulates while the scared money waits for another leg down that doesn't come. We lean long here — not because it feels good, but because the asymmetry is obvious and the pattern match is strong. The bounce, when it comes, won't be trusted. That's exactly why it works.
